description: George Street is a Bloods-affiliated street gang based in Belize City, Belize, allegedly formed in the late 1980s by US deportee Heathcliff Reyes. It is one of the country's earliest gangs and has been involved in violent conflicts with rival gangs. The gang's territory was estimated as among the largest in Belize in 2018, with membership ranging from 40 to 150. As of 2021, it remains one of the largest gangs in Belize.
